name: Three Flavors Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 Fresh medium shrimp (OR 1/4 lb Cooked baby shrimp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and shell the shrimp. Remove any veins.
2. Slice the water chestnuts into thin circles.
3. Mince the green onions completely.
4. Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a pot with the minced green onions.
5. Add the sliced water chestnuts and cook for a few minutes.
6. Add the shrimp (either raw or cooked) and salt.
7. Taste the soup and adjust the seasoning if necessary.
8. Return the soup to a boil briefly.
9. Serve hot.
